_README: Operator-supplied fixtures for the users-requests-followup SANDBOX tests (issue #148).
2. Open test-data.json in YOUR editor (NOT in chat). Replace each <placeholder>
3. Run the presence check: poetry run python chunks/users-requests-followup/sandbox-tests/check_fixtures.py
- fund_code, shipping_cost: OPTIONAL per Alma swagger (required=False on the
update_shipping action). To opt out of either, set the value to one of:
"" (empty string), null (JSON null), or the literal string "None".
The test scripts will simply omit them from the API call.
The agent (Claude) will NEVER Read this file. Only a presence check is performed.
Real values stay on your disk and never enter the agent's context window.
